leadText: The Lustrous Orb (Japanese: しらたま Pearl Orb) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Water-type moves when held by Palkia. It is one of the orbs associated with the Pokémon of myth.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Palkia , it increases the power of its Dragon - and Water-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Platinum , it is required to encounter Palkia at Spear Pillar .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by Palkia , it increases the power of its Dragon - and Water-type moves by 20%.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS A beautifully glowing orb to be held by Palkia . It boosts the power of Dragon- and Water-type moves. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Water-type moves when it is held. S V A beautifully shining gem to be held by Palkia. It boosts the power of Palkia’s Dragon- and Water-type moves.
